name: Raisin Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan and heat until it begins to bubble.
2. Add the peanut butter and continue heating until smooth and more liquidy.
3. Pour the mixture into the icing sugar, then add the nuts and raisins.
4. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are combined.
5. Spoon the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
6. Chill until set, then store in the refrigerator.
